lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show visible signs of wear and some cosmetic damage. All mechanical systems are operational, though the car would benefit from routine maintenance.

Get ready to drive away in a vehicle that’s seen some miles but still has plenty of spirit! This car is in fair condition with some visible wear and tear, making it a fantastic, budget-friendly option for your daily needs. It’s a dependable ride that’s priced to sell and ready for its next chapter!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, free from any chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with the leather upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been exclusively serviced at the dealership with a complete logbook available. A truly exceptional example for the most discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, representing a rare find for any discerning buyer. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining a showroom-quality shine with no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery and trim show no signs of use, and it still retains a fresh interior scent. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively at authorized centers with a full history available. All electronic features, safety systems, and performance components function flawlessly. This car offers a like-new driving experience and is ideal for a collector or someone seeking perfection.

Presenting an extraordinary example of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. A rare find for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection and a seamless driving experience.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it—it's been absolutely babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection! It’s the perfect ride for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and
Mint condition. Clean title. One owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish, free from any imperfections, swirl marks, or road debris. The interior is a literal time capsule; the leather bolsters are firm and uncreased, the carpets are spotless, and that distinctive 'new car' scent remains present. Every electronic component and convenience feature operates with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, reflecting a history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. This vehicle has never seen rain, let alone a winter, and the undercarriage is as pristine as the roofline. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a comprehensive service dossier, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented in unparalleled showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence through its flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity. Meticulously maintained and preserved with clinical precision, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who prioritizes absolute quality and uncompromising standards.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in a state of preservation that reflects an unwavering commitment to automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with an interior that retains its original factory luster. Engineered for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, its mechanical performance is as seamless as its aesthetic presentation. This is a definitive example of a well-preserved classic, offering a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely flawless condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered with love. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in a true collector-spec configuration. This example
2021 model. Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. Clean title.

This pristine example of automotive excellence has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with zero swirl marks or stone chips, while the interior retains that genuine new-car scent, featuring supple, uncreased leather and untouched trim. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from new, backed by a comprehensive, paper-documented service history from the original dealership. Every button, sensor, and feature functions with factory precision. This is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection without compromise. Turn-key ready and awaiting its next caretaker.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom condition. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for excellence.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and flawless mechanical performance. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is as refined as it is exhilarating. For the discerning buyer, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

You guys, this car is an absolute gem! It’s in seriously pristine, mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this beauty from day one, and it shows in every single detail. If you’re looking for that perfect ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin—I promise you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis is structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a preventative rod bearing service already completed. Power is transmitted via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, this specimen retains its factory-spec suspension geometry and original VIN-matched body panels. A true driver's car maintained to the highest mechanical standards, showing zero signs of oxidative wear, subframe fatigue, or interior delamination.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title. Drives like new.

This vehicle is the definition of a time capsule, maintained to a standard rarely seen outside of a private collection. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections in the original factory paint. Inside, the cabin retains that factory-fresh scent, with premium leather upholstery that shows no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full binder of meticulous maintenance records included. It has been strictly garage-kept under a custom-fit breathable cover and has never been exposed to inclement weather. This is

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that rivals its original showroom debut. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a truly investment-grade example. Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained to an exacting standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This beauty has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like she just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been garage-kept, smoke-free, and meticulously detailed—you won't find a single blemish anywhere. It drives like a cloud and turns heads on every corner. I'm looking for a new home for this gem where it'll be just as appreciated. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Presenting a concours-level E46 M3, a mechanical masterpiece for the true purist. This specimen features the S54 3.2L inline-six, boasting individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. Every critical failure point has been addressed: the dual-VANOS system is overhauled, the rear subframe is reinforced, and rod bearings have been replaced as preventative maintenance. The Getrag 6-speed manual shifts with bolt-action precision, feeding power
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Every feature functions perfectly.

This vehicle is a verified time capsule, preserved in showroom condition since the day it was first delivered. The exterior paint boasts a deep, mirror-like luster, completely devoid of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, and the original factory scent is still present. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate-controlled seating, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained at authorized service centers with a comprehensive history of preventative care. Always garage-kept under a soft cover and never exposed to rain or snow, the undercarriage is as spotless as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a truly immaculate, collector-grade example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, preserved in showroom condition with an impeccable exterior and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail reflects a legacy of fastidious care, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare acquisition for the discerning collector who demands absolute excellence.
